messages.content: Hi! How can I help you today?

Hi! I actually need some help with a couple of things related to my recent orders and my address. I just moved to a new house on the same street, and I noticed that one of my orders was sent to my old address. I’d like to get that fixed, and also update my default address to the new place. Also, I want to exchange a tablet I bought for the cheapest one you have, since moving has been expensive. Can you help me with all of this?
